strengths: Deep distributed-systems and high-throughput backend experience (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency async I/O, real-time metadata pipelines)
Emerging agentic-AI exposure at re:cinq including MCP framework contribution and agentic workflow tooling — directly adjacent to the role's core technical domain
Polyglot, full-stack craftsman with consistent evidence of engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) across fintech-adjacent environments including RIDE Capital
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership: resume shows no team management, org scaling, hiring ownership, or technical leadership accountability at any point in a 15+ year career
AI/agent experience is shallow and recent — MCP tooling and agentic workflow support at a current role does not constitute production multi-agent system architecture at commercial scale

No fintech infrastructure depth: brief stint at RIDE Capital as an IC developer is insufficient evidence of credit-risk systems, working-capital management, payment flows, or regulatory compliance architecture
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, experienced individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems depth and an encouraging pivot toward agentic-AI tooling, but he is applying for an executive role that requires demonstrated engineering org leadership, production multi-agent system ownership, and fintech infrastructure fluency — none of which appear meaningfully in his history. The gap between his current Staff Software Engineer profile and the CTO scope (team scaling, board communication, regulated-AI architecture, hybrid-vendor governance) is structural, not a matter of degree.
